verses.latin_vulgate: In anno quo mortuus est rex Ozias, vidi Dominum sedentem super solium excelsum et elevatum ; et ea quæ sub ipso erant replebant templum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּשְׁנַת־מוֹת֙ הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ עֻזִּיָּ֔הוּ וָאֶרְאֶ֧ה אֶת־אֲדֹנָ֛י יֹשֵׁ֥ב עַל־כִּסֵּ֖א רָ֣ם וְנִשָּׂ֑א וְשׁוּלָ֖יו מְלֵאִ֥ים אֶת־הַהֵיכָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the year that king Ozias died, I saw the Lord sitting upon a throne high and elevated: and his train filled the temple.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä vuonna, jona kuningas Ussia kuoli, näin minä Herran istuvan korkialla ja korotetulla istuimella, ja hänen vaatteensa liepeet täyttivät templin.
verses.king_james: In the year that king Uzziah died I saw also the Lord sitting upon a throne, high and lifted up, and his train filled the temple.

verses.latin_vulgate: Seraphim stabant super illud : sex alæ uni, et sex alæ alteri ; duabus velabant faciem ejus, et duabus velabant pedes ejus, et duabus volabant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׂרָפִ֨ים עֹמְדִ֤ים ׀ מִמַּ֙עַל֙ ל֔וֹ שֵׁ֧שׁ כְּנָפַ֛יִם שֵׁ֥שׁ כְּנָפַ֖יִם לְאֶחָ֑ד בִּשְׁתַּ֣יִם ׀ יְכַסֶּ֣ה פָנָ֗יו וּבִשְׁתַּ֛יִם יְכַסֶּ֥ה רַגְלָ֖יו וּבִשְׁתַּ֥יִם יְעוֹפֵֽף׃
verses.douay_rheims: Upon it stood the seraphims: the one had six wings, and the other had six wings: with two they covered his face, and with two they covered his feet, and with two they flew.
verses.finnish_biblia: Seraphit seisoivat häntä ylempänä, ja kullakin oli kuusi siipeä: kahdella he peittivät kasvonsa, kahdella jalkansa, ja kahdella he lensivät.
verses.king_james: Above it stood the seraphims: each one had six wings; with twain he covered his face, and with twain he covered his feet, and with twain he did fly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et clamabant alter ad alterum, et dicebant :   Sanctus, sanctus, sanctus Dominus, Deus exercituum ;  plena est omnis terra gloria ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְקָרָ֨א זֶ֤ה אֶל־זֶה֙ וְאָמַ֔ר קָד֧וֹשׁ ׀ קָד֛וֹשׁ קָד֖וֹשׁ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֑וֹת מְלֹ֥א כׇל־הָאָ֖רֶץ כְּבוֹדֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they cried one to another, and said: Holy, holy, holy, the Lord God of hosts, all the earth is full of his glory,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ne huusivat toinen toisellensa ja sanoivat: Pyhä, pyhä, pyhä, Herra Zebaot: kaikki maa on täynnä hänen kunniaansa;
verses.king_james: And one cried unto another, and said, Holy, holy, holy, is the Lord of hosts: the whole earth is full of his glory.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et commota sunt superliminaria cardinum a voce clamantis, et domus repleta est fumo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּנֻ֙עוּ֙ אַמּ֣וֹת הַסִּפִּ֔ים מִקּ֖וֹל הַקּוֹרֵ֑א וְהַבַּ֖יִת יִמָּלֵ֥א עָשָֽׁן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the lintels of the doors were moved at the voice of him that cried, and the house was filled with smoke.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin että pihtipielet vapisivat heidän huutonsa äänestä, ja huone täytettiin savulla.
verses.king_james: And the posts of the door moved at the voice of him that cried, and the house was filled with smoke.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixi :  Væ mihi, quia tacui,  quia vir pollutus labiis ego sum,  et in medio populi polluta labia habentis ego habito,  et regem Dominum exercituum vidi oculis meis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֹמַ֞ר אֽוֹי־לִ֣י כִֽי־נִדְמֵ֗יתִי כִּ֣י אִ֤ישׁ טְמֵֽא־שְׂפָתַ֙יִם֙ אָנֹ֔כִי וּבְתוֹךְ֙ עַם־טְמֵ֣א שְׂפָתַ֔יִם אָנֹכִ֖י יוֹשֵׁ֑ב כִּ֗י אֶת־הַמֶּ֛לֶךְ יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָא֖וֹת רָא֥וּ עֵינָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I said: Woe is me, because I have held my peace; because I am a man of unclean lips, and I dwell in the midst of a people that hath unclean lips, and I have seen with my eyes the King the Lord of hosts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä sanoin: voi minuani! minä hukun, sillä minulla on saastaiset huulet, ja asun sen kansan seassa, jolla on saastaiset huulet; sillä minun silmäni ovat nähneet kuninkaan, Herran Zebaotin.
verses.king_james: Then said I, Woe is me! for I am undone; because I am a man of unclean lips, and I dwell in the midst of a people of unclean lips: for mine eyes have seen the King, the Lord of hosts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et volavit ad me unus de seraphim, et in manu ejus calculus, quem forcipe tulerat de altari,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֣עׇף אֵלַ֗י אֶחָד֙ מִן־הַשְּׂרָפִ֔ים וּבְיָד֖וֹ רִצְפָּ֑ה בְּמֶ֨לְקַחַ֔יִם לָקַ֖ח מֵעַ֥ל הַמִּזְבֵּֽחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And one of the seraphims flew to me, and in his hand was a live coal, which he had taken with the tongs off the altar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin lensi yksi Seraphimeista minun tyköni, jolla oli kädessä tulinen hiili, jonka hän otti hohtimilla alttarilta,
verses.king_james: Then flew one of the seraphims unto me, having a live coal in his hand, which he had taken with the tongs from off the altar:

verses.latin_vulgate: et tetigit os meum, et dixit :  Ecce tetigit hoc labia tua,  et auferetur iniquitas tua, et peccatum tuum mundabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּגַּ֣ע עַל־פִּ֔י וַיֹּ֕אמֶר הִנֵּ֛ה נָגַ֥ע זֶ֖ה עַל־שְׂפָתֶ֑יךָ וְסָ֣ר עֲוֺנֶ֔ךָ וְחַטָּאתְךָ֖ תְּכֻפָּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he touched my mouth, and said: Behold this hath touched thy lips, and thy iniquities shall be taken away, and thy sin shall be cleansed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja rupesi minun suuhuni, ja sanoi: katso, tällä olen minä ruvennut huuliis, että sinun pahat tekos otettaisiin sinulta pois, ja sinun rikokses olis sovitettu.
verses.king_james: And he laid it upon my mouth, and said, Lo, this hath touched thy lips; and thine iniquity is taken away, and thy sin purged.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et audivi vocem Domini dicentis :  Quem mittam ?  et quis ibit nobis ? Et dixi :  Ecce ego, mitte me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶשְׁמַ֞ע אֶת־ק֤וֹל אֲדֹנָי֙ אֹמֵ֔ר אֶת־מִ֥י אֶשְׁלַ֖ח וּמִ֣י יֵֽלֶךְ־לָ֑נוּ וָאֹמַ֖ר הִנְנִ֥י שְׁלָחֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I heard the voice of the Lord, saying: Whom shall I send? and who shall go for us? And I said: Lo, here am I, send me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä kuulin Herran äänen, että hän sanoi: kenenkä minä lähetän? kuka tahtoo olla meidän sanansaattajamme? Mutta minä sanoin: tässä minä olen, lähetä minua.
verses.king_james: Also I heard the voice of the Lord, saying, Whom shall I send, and who will go for us? Then said I, Here am I; send me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit :  Vade, et dices populo huic :  Audite audientes, et nolite intelligere ;  et videte visionem, et nolite cognoscere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֕אמֶר לֵ֥ךְ וְאָמַרְתָּ֖ לָעָ֣ם הַזֶּ֑ה שִׁמְע֤וּ שָׁמ֙וֹעַ֙ וְאַל־תָּבִ֔ינוּ וּרְא֥וּ רָא֖וֹ וְאַל־תֵּדָֽעוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said: Go, and thou shalt say to this people: Hearing, hear, and understand not: and see the vision, and know it not.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän sanoi: mene ja sano tälle kansalle, kuulten kuulkaat, ja älkäät ymmärtäkö, nähden nähkäät, ja älkäät tähtäkö.
verses.king_james: And he said, Go, and tell this people, Hear ye indeed, but understand not; and see ye indeed, but perceive not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Excæca cor populi hujus,  et aures ejus aggrava,  et oculos ejus claude :  ne forte videat oculis suis,  et auribus suis audiat,  et corde suo intelligat,  et convertatur, et sanem eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשְׁמֵן֙ לֵב־הָעָ֣ם הַזֶּ֔ה וְאׇזְנָ֥יו הַכְבֵּ֖ד וְעֵינָ֣יו הָשַׁ֑ע פֶּן־יִרְאֶ֨ה בְעֵינָ֜יו וּבְאׇזְנָ֣יו יִשְׁמָ֗ע וּלְבָב֥וֹ יָבִ֛ין וָשָׁ֖ב וְרָ֥פָא לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blind the heart of this people, and make their ears heavy, and shut their eyes: lest they see with their eyes, and hear with their ears, and understand with their heart, and be converted and I heal them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Paaduta tämän kansan sydän, ja anna heidän korvansa paksuksi tulla, ja sokaise heidän silmänsä, ettei he näkisi silmillänsä, eikä kuulisi korvillansa, eli myös ymmärtäisi sydämellänsä, eli kääntäisi itsiänsä ja parannetuksi tulisi.
verses.king_james: Make the heart of this people fat, and make their ears heavy, and shut their eyes; lest they see with their eyes, and hear with their ears, and understand with their heart, and convert, and be healed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixi :  Usquequo, Domine ? Et dixit :  Donec desolentur civitates absque habitatore,  et domus sine homine,  et terra relinquetur deserta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֹמַ֕ר עַד־מָתַ֖י אֲדֹנָ֑י וַיֹּ֡אמֶר עַ֣ד אֲשֶׁר֩ אִם־שָׁא֨וּ עָרִ֜ים מֵאֵ֣ין יוֹשֵׁ֗ב וּבָתִּים֙ מֵאֵ֣ין אָדָ֔ם וְהָאֲדָמָ֖ה תִּשָּׁאֶ֥ה שְׁמָמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I said: How long, O Lord? And he said: Until the cities be wasted without inhabitant, and the houses without man, and the land shall be left desolate.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä sanoin: Herra, kuinka kauvan? Hän sanoi: siihenasti kuin kaupungit tulevat kylmille ja ilman asujia, ja huoneet ilman väetä, ja maa on peräti autiona.
verses.king_james: Then said I, Lord, how long? And he answered, Until the cities be wasted without inhabitant, and the houses without man, and the land be utterly desolate,

verses.latin_vulgate: Et longe faciet Dominus homines,  et multiplicabitur quæ derelicta fuerat in medio terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרִחַ֥ק יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־הָאָדָ֑ם וְרַבָּ֥ה הָעֲזוּבָ֖ה בְּקֶ֥רֶב הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord shall remove men far away, and she shall be multiplied that was left in the midst of the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herra ajaa väen kauvas, niin että maa tulee peräti hyljätyksi.
verses.king_james: And the Lord have removed men far away, and there be a great forsaking in the midst of the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et adhuc in ea decimatio,  et convertetur, et erit in ostensionem  sicut terebinthus, et sicut quercus quæ expandit ramos suos ;  semen sanctum erit id quod steterit in ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְע֥וֹד בָּהּ֙ עֲשִׂ֣רִיָּ֔ה וְשָׁ֖בָה וְהָיְתָ֣ה לְבָעֵ֑ר כָּאֵלָ֣ה וְכָאַלּ֗וֹן אֲשֶׁ֤ר בְּשַׁלֶּ֙כֶת֙ מַצֶּ֣בֶת בָּ֔ם זֶ֥רַע קֹ֖דֶשׁ מַצַּבְתָּֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And there shall be still a tithing therein, and she shall turn, and shall be made a show as a turpentine tree, and as an oak that spreadeth its branches: that which shall stand therein, shall be a holy seed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ehkä kymmenes osa siihen vielä jää, niin sekin taas hävitetään; kuitenkin niinkuin tammelle ja tuomelle jää kanto, vaikka heidän lehtensä varistetaan, niin pitää myös pyhällä siemenellä kanto oleman.
verses.king_james: But yet in it shall be a tenth, and it shall return, and shall be eaten: as a teil tree, and as an oak, whose substance is in them, when they cast their leaves: so the holy seed shall be the substance thereof.
